description: Analyze protocol code coverage, document gaps

instructions.intent: Audit the roadmap protocol implementation to identify code coverage gaps, missing edge cases, and potential improvements. Produce a structured markdown document cataloging findings with severity levels and remediation guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Document covers: protocol API surface, test coverage per function, edge cases, error handling gaps
Severity ratings (critical, high, medium, low) applied
Each finding includes: affected function, gap description, remediation guidance
